allow: Bash(docker compose exec web find / -name "_common_head.html.erb" -type f)
Bash(docker compose exec web find / -name "custom-redesign*" -type f)

Bash(docker compose exec web bash -c "ls /app/ 2>/dev/null || ls /opt/openproject/ 2>/dev/null || ls /home/app/ 2>/dev/null || echo ''checking root''; find / -maxdepth 3 -name ''Gemfile'' 2>/dev/null | head -3")
Bash(docker compose exec web find /app/app/views/layouts -name "*.erb" -type f)

Bash(docker compose exec web bash -c 'echo """" >> /app/app/views/layouts/_common_head.html.erb && echo ""<link rel=\\""stylesheet\\"" href=\\""/custom-redesign.css\\"" type=\\""text/css\\"">"" >> /app/app/views/layouts/_common_head.html.erb')
Bash(timeout 90 bash -c 'while ! docker compose exec web curl -sf http://localhost:8080/health_checks/default > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 5; echo ""waiting...""; done')
Bash(docker compose exec web bash -c "grep ''op-settings-card'' /app/app/components/projects/settings/general/show_component.html.erb | head -2")

Bash(docker compose exec web bash -c "ls -la /app/public/custom-redesign.css && grep ''op-settings-card'' /app/app/components/projects/settings/general/show_component.html.erb | wc -l && grep ''op-settings-card'' /app/app/views/projects/settings/general/show.html.erb | wc -l && tail -2 /app/app/views/layouts/_common_head.html.erb")
Bash(docker compose exec web bash -c "find /app/public -name ''*.css'' -type f 2>/dev/null")
Bash(timeout 90 bash -c 'while ! docker compose exec web curl -sf http://localhost:8080/health_checks/default > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 5; done')
Bash(docker compose exec proxy curl -sf -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://web:8080/health_checks/default)

Bash(docker compose exec web bash -c "curl -sf -b ''cookie=test'' http://localhost:8080/projects/demo-project/settings/general 2>/dev/null | grep -oP ''class=""[^""]*Button[^""]*""'' | sort -u | head -20")

Bash(docker compose exec web bash -c "curl -sf http://localhost:8080/projects/demo-project/settings/general 2>/dev/null | grep -i ''change_identifier\\|Change identifier\\|Button--primary\\|btn-primary\\|button.*primary'' | head -10")
Bash(docker compose exec web bash -c "curl -sf http://localhost:8080/projects/demo-project/settings/general 2>/dev/null | grep -oP ''<body[^>]*>'' | head -1")
Bash(docker compose exec web bash -c "grep -rn ''def body_css_classes'' /app/app/helpers/ /app/lib/")
Bash(docker compose exec web bash -c "grep -rn ''Storage\\|storage'' /app/app/views/projects/settings/ 2>/dev/null | grep -i ''button\\|Button\\|btn\\|link'' | head -10")
Bash(docker compose exec web bash -c "find /app -path ''*/storages*'' -name ''*.erb'' | grep -i ''settings\\|header\\|index'' | head -10")
Bash(docker compose exec web bash -c "grep -n ''Button\\|button\\|primary\\|scheme'' /app/modules/storages/app/views/storages/project_settings/external_file_storages.html.erb 2>/dev/null | head -10")
Bash(docker compose exec web bash -c "find /app/modules/storages -name ''header_component*'' | head -5")
Bash(docker compose exec web bash -c "curl -sf http://localhost:8080/custom-redesign.css 2>/dev/null | grep ''op-settings-grid'' | head -3")
Bash(docker compose exec web bash -c "curl -sf http://localhost:8080/custom-redesign.css 2>/dev/null | wc -c")

Bash(docker exec openproject-docker-web-1 bash -c 'curl -s -b ""_open_project_session=test"" http://localhost:8080/projects/demo-project/settings/general 2>/dev/null | grep -o ""op-settings-grid[^\\""]*"" | head -5')
